name: Fast Payday Loans, Inc.
description_short: Fast Payday Loans, Inc. offers payday advances up to $1,000 with same-day funding at their Miami location. Requires valid ID, recent pay stub, and active checking account.
description_long:
Fast Payday Loans, Inc. operates a physical storefront location in Miami, Florida specializing in short-term payday loans. The company has positioned itself as a quick-access solution for residents facing immediate financial emergencies who cannot wait for their next paycheck. Their Miami location at 2132 SW 8th Street has been established to serve the local community with accessible in-person service.

The company offers payday cash advances up to $1,000 with a stated processing time of as little as 30 minutes from application to funding. Their process begins with an online request form submission, followed by a courtesy callback from a store representative to explain terms and requirements, and concludes with an in-person visit to complete paperwork and receive cash. The company emphasizes accessibility regardless of credit history, meaning applicants with poor or no credit can potentially qualify.

Fast Payday Loans distinguishes itself through its hybrid online-to-offline model: customers can initiate applications online but must visit the physical store to complete the transaction and receive funds. The company operates extended hours (9AM-6PM weekdays, 9AM-4PM Saturday) and provides same-day turnaround. Their straightforward documentation requirements—driver's license, recent pay stub, and active checking account—are standard industry practice and relatively low-barrier compared to traditional lending.

This is a traditional payday lender offering a legal but high-cost financial product. Customers should be aware that while the company provides emergency liquidity, payday loans typically carry significant interest rates and fees that are not disclosed on this landing page. The 30-minute processing claim and $1,000 maximum are consistent with emergency-cash category products, but the true cost of borrowing and terms should be carefully reviewed before commitment.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day funding available within 30 minutes of in-store completion
Loans available up to $1,000 per the website
No credit history check required—accessible to borrowers with poor/no credit
Extended hours including Saturday (9AM-4PM) for working customers
Hybrid model allows online initiation before in-person visit, reducing full store time
Low documentation barrier—only requires ID, pay stub, and active checking account
In-person representative support to explain terms and answer questions pre-commitment
cons: No interest rates, fees, or APR disclosed on this landing page—true cost of borrowing is hidden
Payday loans historically carry very high APRs (often 400%+) not mentioned here
Requires in-person visit to physical location; no fully remote/online funding
Limited to Miami location; not available statewide or nationally
Short repayment terms typical of payday loans create debt cycle risk
best_for: Miami-area residents facing immediate cash emergencies with no access to traditional credit
Employed individuals with recent pay stubs who need cash before next paycheck
Borrowers with poor credit history unable to qualify for bank loans or credit cards
Customers preferring in-person service and same-day cash pickup over digital-only lending
diagnosis: Fast Payday Loans, Inc. is best for Miami residents with urgent cash needs and active employment who qualify for short-term credit and prefer in-person service. Critical caveat: This company does not disclose interest rates or fees on this landing page, which is standard practice for payday lenders—borrowers must ask directly about APR and total cost before committing, as payday loans are high-cost debt products with typical rates exceeding 400% APR.
services: Online payday loan request form submission
Courtesy phone consultation to review terms and requirements
In-person application completion and document review
Same-day funding (within 30 minutes of in-store completion)
Qualification evaluation based on pay stub and checking account
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
